'''rarolo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:feathery|feathery]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-r-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:feathery|feathery]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| rarolo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræreleth|ræreleth]] || [[word:rærelej|rærelej]] || [[word:rærelesh|rærelesh]] || [[word:rærele|rærele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:raroroloth|raroroloth]] || [[word:raroroloj|raroroloj]] || [[word:rarorolosh|rarorolosh]] || [[word:rarorolo|rarorolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:raroloth|raroloth]] || [[word:raroloj|raroloj]] || [[word:rarolosh|rarolosh]] || [[word:rarolo|rarolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rarofloth|rarofloth]] || [[word:rarofloj|rarofloj]] || [[word:raroflosh|raroflosh]] || [[word:raroflof|raroflof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rarolotho|rarolotho]] || [[word:rarolojo|rarolojo]] || [[word:rarolosho|rarolosho]] || [[word:raroloko|raroloko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:raroloth|raroloth]] || [[word:raroloj|raroloj]] || [[word:rarolosh|rarolosh]] || [[word:rarolo|rarolo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rarolothol|rarolothol]] || [[word:rarolojol|rarolojol]] || [[word:raroloshol|raroloshol]] || [[word:rarolokol|rarolokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rarolothotho|rarolothotho]] || [[word:rarolojojo|rarolojojo]] || [[word:raroloshosho|raroloshosho]] || [[word:raroloko|raroloko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rarolothon|rarolothon]] || [[word:rarolojon|rarolojon]] || [[word:raroloshon|raroloshon]] || [[word:rarolokon|rarolokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rarolothoro|rarolothoro]] || [[word:rarolojoro|rarolojoro]] || [[word:raroloshoro|raroloshoro]] || [[word:rarolokoro|rarolokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
